title: eriocaulon willdenovianum
intro: Eriocaulon willdenovianum, commonly known as Willdenow's pipewort, is a plant species in the family Eriocaulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being.
